text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
<chrname> has made amazing strides
these past few years, earning us both a
well-deserved break.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I receive an invite from Tazuna to watch a race,
so I make my way to the racecourse.

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text: Ah... Trainer! Over here!

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text: This isn't the time we agreed on. You're early!

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text: Hehe, that's true. I just couldn't wait!

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text: Well, let's get going!

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text: Sigh... Today was as exciting as ever! But that's to be expected from a G1 race!

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
Yes, exactly! I could swear the ground was
shaking from all the cheering at one point!

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
The excitement, the emotion... There's no
denying it—races are wonderful!

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text: Um, Trainer...

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text: Thanks for accepting my invitation today.

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
I really wanted to take this opportunity to
express my gratitude to you.

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text: That's right.

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
You and <chrname> have swept
through race after race these past three years.

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
Watching both of your efforts always made my
heart leap with excitement, whether it was in
person or on TV.

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
I've witnessed so many miraculous moments
because of you... It's like something from a
dream.

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text: So, once again... Thank you so much!

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
Oh, and please keep striving towards the future!
Injury free, of course!

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text: That's good to hear! ♪

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
I'll continue to watch over you two from here on
out!

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text: ...From just a little closer than ever. ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Later, we meet up with <chrname>
and enjoy the next race together.
